signals.headline: Solana (SOL)** holds above $84 support toward $75-110 monthly targets, noted as a top April watch alongside XRP amid dev
signals.raw:
Solana (SOL)** holds above $84 support toward $75-110 monthly targets, noted as a top April watch alongside XRP amid developer activity (e.g., Nokia Snake on Solana blockchain).[2]

No fresh confirmations on **Bitcoin**; XRP/SOL price analyses show historical April patterns for gains but ongoing caution (e.g., XRP below $1.20 weekly signals risk).[2][4]
matched_markets: Will the price of XRP be above $1.60 on April 16?
Will the price of Solana be above $100 on April 16?
